name: Pumpkin Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can (16 oz.) solid-pack pumpkin, up to 2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a covered saucepan, heat all ingredients except cream to boiling.
2. Reduce the heat; simmer, uncovered for 20 minutes.
3. Stir in the warm cream into the soup.
4. Garnish with parsley and serve from a hollowed-out pumpkin that has been warmed for 20 minutes in a 350 degree oven. (My mother, Marge Beckler, serves this soup each Thanksgiving in tiny, hollowed pumpkins for each grandchild. Our twin sons Collin and Matthew enjoyed this soup as 10-month-olds on their first Thanksgiving day!)
